process.title: How Do We Work?
process.subtitle: We take your restaurant from dream to reality in four steps.
process.step1.title: 1. Free Inspection
process.step1.text: We examine your premises on-site. We analyze your needs, take measurements and share initial ideas. This stage is completely free.
process.step2.title: 2. Planning & Design
process.step2.text: 3D modeling, kitchen layout, ergonomics planning and cost analysis. Our architects and engineers prepare the detailed project.
process.step3.title: 3. Production & Implementation
process.step3.text: Custom equipment production, renovation works, electrical and plumbing, sign installation. We coordinate and follow all processes.
process.step4.title: 4. Delivery & Support
process.step4.text: Equipment testing, staff training, warranty documents and 24/7 technical support line. We provide logistics support for international deliveries.
about.title: Who is Tuncerdesing?
about.text1: Since 2009, Tuncerdesing has been a pioneering company in the industrial kitchen sector, offering comprehensive solutions to its customers under one roof.
about.text2: We don't just sell equipment; we are with you at every step from setup to operation. With our custom manufacturing capacity, experienced technical team and global logistics network, we produce world-class services.
about.feature1.title: Quality Certificates
about.feature2.title: 2 Year Warranty
about.feature3.title: Fast Delivery
about.feature4.title: Affordable Prices
cta.title: Ready to Build Your Dream Business?
cta.description: Start with our free inspection service. Our expert team will visit your premises and offer the most suitable solutions.
faq.title: Curious About
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about industrial kitchen and restaurant setup.
faq.q1: What are the prices of industrial kitchen equipment?
faq.a1: Prices vary depending on the project and equipment type. We have price lists for standard products such as stainless steel stoves, ovens and hoods. For custom production projects, we offer a free inspection service with a clear price quote.
faq.q2: How long does restaurant setup take?
faq.a2: It varies between 2-8 weeks depending on the size of the project. Small kitchen arrangements are completed in 1-2 weeks, while complete restaurant setup takes an average of 4-6 weeks. A detailed project timeline is provided during the planning phase.
faq.q3: Do you ship kitchen equipment abroad?
faq.a3: Yes, we offer safe and fast logistics solutions to over 50 countries. We complete your international projects seamlessly with our customs procedures, packaging and door-to-door delivery services.
faq.q4: Can I have custom kitchen equipment manufactured?
faq.a4: Absolutely. We manufacture kitchen equipment in custom sizes, designs and functions on stainless steel. We bring your desired product to life with 3D modeling and prototype production.
faq.q5: Do you have warranty and technical support services?
faq.a5: We offer a 2-year warranty on all our equipment. We are with you with our 24/7 technical support line, maintenance, repair and spare parts services after installation. Remote support is also available.
